name: sonar-complexity
description: Calculate and display cognitive complexity (SonarQube S3776) for functions in JS/TS and Python

sonarComplexity.enabled.description: Enable or disable cognitive complexity analysis.

sonarComplexity.analysis.include.description: Folders to include in workspace analysis. E.g. ["src", "lib"]. Defaults to the entire workspace.

sonarComplexity.thresholds.warning.description: Complexity score at or above which a function is marked as warning (yellow). SonarQube S3776 flags at 15, so 10 gives an early heads-up.

sonarComplexity.thresholds.error.description: Complexity score at or above which a function is marked as error (red). SonarQube S3776 flags at 15, so 16+ indicates a violation.

sonarComplexity.display.codeLens.description: Show complexity scores as CodeLens above functions.

sonarComplexity.display.gutterIcons.description: Show colored dots in the gutter next to function declarations.

sonarComplexity.display.diagnostics.description: Report complexity issues in the Problems panel.

sonarComplexity.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay (ms) before re-analyzing after text changes.

sonarComplexity.largeFileThreshold.description: Line count above which large-file optimizations activate.

sonarComplexity.smells.enabled.description: Enable or disable code smell detection (S107, S134, S3358, S108, S3699, S1126, S1479).

sonarComplexity.smells.maxParameters.description: S107: Maximum number of parameters a function may have before being flagged.

sonarComplexity.smells.maxNestingDepth.description: S134: Maximum nesting depth before flagging as too deeply nested.

sonarComplexity.smells.maxReturns.description: S3699: Maximum number of return statements a function may have.

sonarComplexity.smells.maxSwitchCases.description: S1479: Maximum number of cases in a switch statement (JS/TS only).
